question: Is the image styled as a realistic photography of a concert hall stage?
Is the scene viewed from directly in front of the audience seats (center perspective)?
Is there exactly 1 dark wooden conductor's podium in the center foreground?
Does the conductor's podium have narrow metal trim along its edges?
Are there exactly 2 conductor's batons placed on the podium?
Are the two batons placed diagonally and parallel to each other?
Is one baton standard white with its tip pointing toward the upper right?
Is there exactly 1 black grand piano on the left side of the frame?
Is the piano lid open forming a triangular shape?
Is the piano's string area facing toward center stage with a reflective lacquer finish?
Is there exactly 1 black piano bench in front of the piano, aligned with the keyboard?
Are there exactly 3 violins resting on the seats of 3 black chairs in the front-center of the stage?
Are the three violins evenly spaced?
Does the left violin have dark brown wood grain with its scroll pointing lower left?
Does the middle violin have a bright cyan-blue lacquered finish with its scroll pointing lower right?
Does the right violin have warm brown coloring with its scroll pointing lower right?
Are there exactly 2 cellos leaning against chair backs in the center-right area?
Does the front cello have standard warm brown wood grain?
Does the rear cello have a green metallic body?
Is there exactly 1 dark brown double bass standing upright on a stand in the right rear?
Is the double bass scroll positioned near the upper right of the frame?
Are there exactly 2 flutes placed horizontally on a music stand tray near the back of the conductor's podium?
Is the front flute silver metal with reflective keys and opening facing left?
Is the rear flute pure white ceramic-textured with opening facing left?
Are there exactly 2 black clarinets resting on chair seats below the flutes?
Do the clarinets have clearly visible silver keys and bells both facing lower right?
Is there exactly 1 golden trumpet resting on a black stand in the center-left area?
Is the trumpet bell facing toward the left of the frame with prominent edge highlights?
Are there exactly 3 timpani drums arranged in an arc/row in the left rear?
Do the timpani drums have copper-colored bodies?
Does the middle timpani drum have a pink drumhead?
Do the other two timpani drums have pale beige drumheads?
Are there exactly 7 black music stands arranged in a semicircle in the center-rear?
Does each music stand hold exactly 1 pure white sheet of music paper?
Is the background a deep red velvet curtain with folds running from top to bottom?
Are there exactly 2 track spotlights in the upper right of the frame shining downward?
Do the spotlight pools fall near the conductor's podium and the middle violin?
Is there exactly 1 black microphone stand standing vertically in the foreground slightly to the right?
Does the microphone stand have a small black windscreen at the top?
Is the microphone stand positioned in front of the conductor's podium?
Are there any severe visual artifacts or distortions (e.g., malformed instruments, melting geometry)?
